title: Add background music with play/pause toggle and music note indicator

requirements.summary: Implement background music in AppContext with module-level Audio object, error handling, and toggleMusic function
acceptanceCriteria: Audio object is created at module scope, not inside useState or on every render
Audio has loop = true and volume = 1.0
isMusicPlaying is false by default on first load (no autoplay)
toggleMusic() correctly plays or pauses the audio and updates isMusicPlaying state
An 'error' event listener silently sets isMusicPlaying to false on load failure
No crash occurs if the audio file is missing or blocked
Context exposes isMusicPlaying and toggleMusic to consumers

file_operations.description: Replace the existing auto-play music implementation with a module-level Audio variable created outside the component. On first provider mount, initialize the audio object with src='/assets/music/background.mp3', loop=true, volume=1.0, and attach an error event listener that silently sets isMusicPlaying to false. Add isMusicPlaying state (default false) and toggleMusic function that wraps audio.play()/pause() in try/catch and updates state accordingly. Expose both values via context. Remove any autoplay logic. Ensure all audio operations fail silently without crashing the app.

requirements.summary: Add music toggle button to AppShell with visual indicator and pink glow pulse animation
acceptanceCriteria: Music toggle button is visible in the top-right corner of every page
Button shows '♪' when music is playing and '🔇' when paused
Clicking the button starts or stops the music
A pink glow pulse CSS animation is active on the button only while music is playing
Dark mode toggle and all other AppShell elements are unaffected
No crash if AppContext is missing or toggleMusic is undefined

file_operations.description: Add a music toggle button in the top-right corner alongside the existing dark mode toggle. Use useContext to read isMusicPlaying and toggleMusic from AppContext. Display '♪' when music is playing and '🔇' when paused. On click, call toggleMusic with a safety check to prevent crashes if context is undefined. Apply a pink glow pulse CSS animation (box-shadow pulsing from rgba(244,114,182,0.6) to transparent) only when isMusicPlaying is true. Ensure the button is positioned consistently with the dark mode toggle and does not affect any other AppShell elements.

requirements.summary: Create music asset directory with README explaining file placement
acceptanceCriteria: Directory frontend/public/assets/music/ exists in the project
A README.md is present inside that directory explaining where to place background.mp3
The audio src path '/assets/music/background.mp3' resolves as a valid static asset URL in the ICP deployment environment when the file is present

file_operations.description: Create a README.md file instructing users to place their background music file as background.mp3 in this directory. The file will be loaded by AppContext.tsx at /assets/music/background.mp3. This ensures the directory exists in the build output and the path resolves correctly in ICP deployment.
